subcodes.first_line: O ye true friends and loved ones of God! The Candle shineth resplendent, and the century of the Abha Beauty is even as a flowering rose-garden
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حقیقی و دوستان الهی شمع روشن است و قرن جمال ابهی گلزار و گلشن فجر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
